scene.setting: chaotic and under attack with multiple large explosions and fire erupting in the background, causing debris to fly through the air and people to run for cover.

key_actions: a large explosion erupts on the right, sending fire and debris into the air
people run away from the explosions
a second explosion occurs, engulfing a section of the stone building in flames

audio_description: Loud explosions and chaos with panicked shouting from people.
